title: Dramatis Personae
html:
Dramatis Personae

  • Mr. Horner.

  • Mr. Harcourt.

  • Mr. Dorilant.

  • Mr. Pinchwife.

  • Mr. Sparkish.

  • Sir Jasper Fidget.

  • A Boy.

  • A Quack.

  • Waiters, Servants, and Attendants.

  • Mrs. Margery Pinchwife.

  • Alithea, Sister of Pinchwife.

  • Lady Fidget.

  • Mrs. Dainty Fidget, Sister of Sir Jasper.

  • Mrs. Squeamish.

  • Old Lady Squeamish.

  • Lucy, Alithea’s Maid.

Scene﻿—London.
